item.name: Authentication
item.description: Endpoints for authenticating users and customers.

request.description:
Authenticate using email or phone with a password. Returns a Sanctum token and user data.
Works for both admin users and customers.
Revoke the current Sanctum access token.
Return the authenticated user's information.

query.description: Number of results per page (1-100). Defaults to 15.

request.description: Get a paginated list of game categories.

request.description: Get details of a single category by ID.
Add a new game category. Admin only.
Update an existing game category. Admin only.
Remove a game category. Admin only.

item.name: Custom USB Orders
item.description: Place and manage custom USB stick orders.

request.description: Get all custom USB orders for the authenticated customer.
Create a new custom USB stick order with selected games.

variable.description: The ID of the custom usb order.

request.description: Get details of a single custom USB order.

variable.description: The ID of the custom usb order.

request.description: Update an existing custom USB order (notes, games, address, etc.).

variable.description: The ID of the custom usb order.

request.description: Delete (cancel) a custom USB order.
Create a new customer account. Public endpoint.
Get a list of all Iraqi governorates for address selection.
Get details of a single customer. Admin only.
Get all registered customers with their governorates. Admin only.
Update an existing customer's information. Admin only.
Remove a customer account. Admin only.

item.name: Game Images
item.description: Upload, serve, and delete game images.

request.description: Serve the full-size image file directly.
Serve the 300x300 thumbnail of a game image.
Upload a new image for a game. Creates both a full-size and a 300x300 thumbnail. Admin only.

response.body: {"message": "Uploaded file is not a valid image."}

request.description: Delete a game image and its associated thumbnail. Admin only.

query.description: Search by English or Arabic name.

request.description: Get a paginated list of games, filterable by search, platform, and category.
Get details of a single game by ID with its category and platform.
Add a new game entry. Admin only.
Update an existing game entry. Admin only.
Remove a game entry. Admin only.

item.name: Packages
item.description: Manage game packages (bundles of games for USB sticks).

request.description:
Get a paginated list of game packages with their cover, platform, and games.
Supports search and platform filtering.
Get details of a single package with its cover, platform, and games.
Add a new game package. Admin only.
Update an existing game package. Admin only.
Remove a game package. Admin only.
Increment the view counter for a package. Admin only.
Increment the order counter for a package. Admin only.

query.description: Number of results per page (1-100). Defaults to 15.
